spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 1 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles several edge cases (errors, fallbacks, feature detection, denials) — not just the happy path.

references.rationale: The concept page now cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/5100352332627968 self-heal anchor.

design_system.rationale: The concept uses shared design-system variables for page styling, and the run button sets both background and color.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp in Chrome/148.0.0.0 at http://localhost:3000/v147/web-printing-api/compatibility-lab/. Before the fix, the concept page had no chromestatus.com/feature/5100352332627968 link. The Run probe control reported navigator.printing unavailable outside an IWA, window.print available, beforeprint/afterprint available, and secure context true. After the fix, the concept page includes the required ChromeStatus link plus the WICG explainer reference, and the concept DOM contains zero raw hex color literals. The /conformance/ route ran with 5 pass / 0 fail. Console had no warnings/errors and network requests succeeded.
